debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
hB : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), N = sSup (B N hN)
hB' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), sSupIndep (B N hN)
hB'' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), ⊥ ∉ B N hN
x : PersistenceSubmodule M
hx : x ∈ ⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN
a : PersistenceSubmodule M
ha : a ≤ x
ha' : a ≤ sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x})
⊢ a ≤ ⊥

failed_attempts:
simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hx⟩
    let Y := sSup (B N hN \ {x})
    let Z := sSup (D.carrier \ {N})
    have h_le_Z : sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x}) ≤ Y ⊔ Z := by
      apply sSup_le
      intro b hb
      rcases hb with ⟨hb_mem, hb_ne_x⟩
      simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hb_mem
      rcases hb_mem with ⟨M, hM, hb_in_BM⟩
      by_cases h_eq : M = N
      · subst h_eq
        left
        apply le_sSup
        exact ⟨hb_in_BM, hb_ne_x⟩
      · right
        apply le_trans (le_sSup hb_in_BM)
        rw [← hB M hM]
        apply le_sSup
        exact ⟨hM, h_eq⟩
    have x_le_N : x ≤ N := by rw [hB N hN]; exact le_sSup hx
    have Y_le_N : Y ≤ N := by rw [hB N hN]; exact sSup_le_sSup (Set.diff_subset _ _)
    have h_disj : Disjoint N Z := D.sSupIndep' N hN
    have a_le_Y : a ≤ Y := by
      apply le_of_le_of_eq (le_inf (le_trans ha x_le_N) (le_trans ha' h_le_Z))
      rw [inf_comm, inf_sup_eq_of_le_right Y_le_N]
      simp [h_disj.eq_bot]
    exact (hB' N hN x hx).le_bot_of_le (le_inf ha a_le_Y)
  sSup_eq_top' := by
    simp_rw [sSup_iUnion, hB]
    rw [← sSup_eq_iSup', D.sSup_eq_top']
  not_bot_mem' := by
    simp only [Set.mem_iUnion]
    rintro ⟨N, hN, h_bot⟩
    exact hB'' N hN h_bot
